description.value:
Frequency once per 10 minutes

You direct your team to uncover hidden foes and exploit newly discovered weaknesses. Signal up to two squadmates within the aura of your commander's banner; they can immediately [[/act seek]] as a free action. Afterward, each can spend a reaction to either Point Out an enemy, Stride toward an enemy they're observing, or attempt to Strike an enemy they're observing. Each of the squadmates deals additional precision damage equal to half your level with their next successful Strike before the end of your next turn against a creature that has become observed by them from a successful Perception check to Seek.
